About Us Page.title: About Us
About Us Page.desc-1: For more than two decades, Roadmaster Speaker has been part of Indonesia's audio journey—transforming from its origins in Car Audio Head Units into an active speaker brand known for delivering powerful sound, strong output, and reliable performance.
About Us Page.desc-2: We believe sound is not meant to be heard alone—sound should be felt. That is why every Roadmaster product is designed to create real impact, whether for entertainment or semi-professional use.
About Us Page.desc-3: The trust we have earned comes not only from users, but also from institutions, including collaborations with government programs in providing audio systems for public needs.
About Us Page.desc-4: Today, Roadmaster is more than just a speaker brand. We are a symbol of powerful sound, innovation, and continuous evolution.
milestones-desc: Roadmaster was born with its first product, a Car Audio Head Unit, laying the initial foundation in the audio industry.
Started producing bookshelf speakers, expanding the product portfolio with continuously improving quality.
Roadmaster officially entered the active speaker market by introducing the Basso Series, which became one of the Top Best-Selling Active Speakers in Indonesia.

The success of the KD Pro Series, larger active speakers with a semi-professional concept and a built-in mixer as its flagship feature. It once again became one of the Top Best-Selling Active Speakers in Indonesia.

Introducing the Monster Series, active speakers with a slimmer, more stylish, and exclusive design targeting the modern urban market. It has become an iconic Roadmaster speaker product to this day with the Reborn variant.
Participated in a regional government program for the procurement of public address sound equipment using one of the models from the Roadmaster PA Series.
